subject: A massive mace or warhammer head wreathed in explosive fire is swung by a gauntleted hand in the lower right, the weapon's impact sending an armored figure flying at the top of the frame amid a fireball
description: A dramatic close-up of a heavy mace or warhammer being swung from the lower right foreground upward into the frame. The weapon's head is an ornate multi-pronged flanged design, entirely engulfed in a massive bloom of orange-yellow fire and explosion. At the very top of the composition, a small armored figure — tumbling mid-air — is caught in the explosion, either being struck or launched. The wielder's gauntleted hand and the lower portion of the mace's haft are visible at the frame's edge; the wielder themselves is off-canvas. The background is smoky purple-grey and dark. The image is almost entirely fire and motion, with the mace head as the focal point.
foreground: Mace head wreathed in fire; gauntleted hand gripping haft
background: Smoky purple-grey sky; small armored figure tumbling at frame top
emotion: total force and violence; the weapon overwhelms the frame; the struck figure is helpless
